tools.name: search_pet_listings
tools.description: Search live pet listings for sale or adoption on Pawlisty. Use whenever a user wants to buy or adopt a pet or asks what is available, filtered by species, breed, location, price, or care attributes. Returns current listings with links to pawlisty.com.

tools.name: get_pet_listing
tools.description: Get full details for one Pawlisty listing by id. Use after search_pet_listings when the user wants more on a specific pet. To contact the seller the user must visit the listing page.

tools.name: get_buying_guide
tools.description: Return Pawlisty buyer-safety guidance (avoiding pet scams, FAQ on buying/adopting safely). Use for any "how do I safely buy or adopt a pet" or "is this listing a scam" question. Returns a summary and a link to the full guide on pawlisty.com.

tools.name: browse_breeds
tools.description: List pet breeds Pawlisty covers, with links to breed guides and current availability. Use when comparing breeds or researching before buying. Returns a breed id usable in search_pet_listings.
